description: Kung Fu is a martial art, but in traditional Chinese, it also means "skill achieved through hard work." It features heavy strikes and flexible body control, excelling at overwhelming opponents.
initiate: You adopt a kung fu stance.

static_buffs.name: Kung Fu Breathing
static_buffs.description: A unique breathing technique that keeps you calm at all times. Dodge +1, bash damage 1.1x bonus.

onmove_buffs.name: Kung Fu Footwork
onmove_buffs.description: Footwork that lets you transition between attack and dodge at any time. Hit +2, dodge +2 bonus.

ondodge_buffs.name: Seize the Opening
ondodge_buffs.description: The moment you dodge an attack isn't always your only opportunity. Always watch for an opening to counter. Dodge +2, bash damage 1.3x bonus. Stacks up to 3 times.
